scenario.name: Support Ticket Pipeline
scenario.task_text:
Parse the JSON ticket data. Filter to tickets with priority="high" AND status="open".
Count the total (open_high_count), then count by category:
billing (billing_count), technical (technical_count), general (general_count).

bricks.raw_response:
name: filter_and_count_tickets
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 10 steps
inputs:
  raw_api_response: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_extract_json_from_str
  brick: extract_json_from_str
  params:
    text: ${inputs.raw_api_response}
  save_as: step_1_extract_json_from_str
- name: step_2_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_1_extract_json_from_str.result}
    key: priority
    value: high
  save_as: step_2_filter_dict_list
- name: step_3_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_2_filter_dict_list.result}
    key: status
    value: open
  save_as: step_3_filter_dict_list
- name: step_4_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_3_filter_dict_list.result}
    key: category
    value: billing
  save_as: step_4_filter_dict_list
- name: step_5_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_4_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_5_count_dict_list
- name: step_6_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_3_filter_dict_list.result}
    key: category
    value: general
  save_as: step_6_filter_dict_list
- name: step_7_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_3_filter_dict_list.result}
    key: category
    value: technical
  save_as: step_7_filter_dict_list
- name: step_8_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_3_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_8_count_dict_list
- name: step_9_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_7_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_9_count_dict_list
- name: step_10_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_6_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_10_count_dict_list
outputs_map:
  open_high_count: ${step_8_count_dict_list.result}
  billing_count: ${step_5_count_dict_list.result}
  technical_count: ${step_9_count_dict_list.result}
  general_count: ${step_10_count_dict_list.result}
bricks.dsl_code:
@flow
def filter_and_count_tickets(raw_api_response):
    parsed       = step.extract_json_from_str(text=raw_api_response)
    high         = step.filter_dict_list(items=parsed.output, key="priority", value="high")
    open_high    = step.filter_dict_list(items=high.output, key="status", value="open")
    total_count  = step.count_dict_list(items=open_high.output)
    billing      = step.filter_dict_list(items=open_high.output, key="category", value="billing")
    technical    = step.filter_dict_list(items=open_high.output, key="category", value="technical")
    general      = step.filter_dict_list(items=open_high.output, key="category", value="general")
    bill_count   = step.count_dict_list(items=billing.output)
    tech_count   = step.count_dict_list(items=technical.output)
    gen_count    = step.count_dict_list(items=general.output)
    return {"open_high_count": total_count, "billing_count": bill_count,
            "technical_count": tech_count, "general_count": gen_count}
